meta.title: The Race To Native Code Execution In PLCs
meta.description: Sharon Brizinov of Claroty gets into the technical details of how they escaped the Siemens S7 PLC sandbox and execute native byte code on the PLC. This was a session on S4x22's Stage 2: Technical Deep Dives.
